arts.ttl: Real Madrid star leading all players in Europe’s top leagues in progressive carries
arts.sum: A statistic, highlighting the ongoing excellence of Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. with the ball at his feet this season, has come to the fore online. Wide-man Vinícius is for…

arts.ttl: Osasuna vs. Real Madrid: Predicted Los Blancos XI for La Liga contest
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Real Madrid could line up in Saturday's La Liga clash with Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid trusting new improvised defense to hold on to La Liga lead
arts.sum: Depleted of defenders, coach Carlo Ancelotti fielded a back line that played together for the first time on Tuesday and won at Manchester City 3-2 in the first leg of the Champions League playoffs. Tchouaméni is a midfielder plugged into the central defense and Valverde is also out of position at right back.

arts.ttl: Vinícius Jr. hits back at Man City over fan banner after Real Madrid’s UCL victory
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. has aimed a subtle dig back in the direction of the group of Manchester City supporters who took aim at him during this week’s meeting…

arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: Real Madrid vs. Real Sociedad; Copa de la Reina
arts.sum: Real Madrid face Real Sociedad in the quarter-final match of Copa de la Reina . Only a week later, Real Madrid awaits Real Sociedad on their home ground to face them in the remaining domestic competition.
